name: Leverage Shares 2x Citigroup ETC A
summary: Leverage Shares 2x Citigroup ETC A is an exchange-traded commodity (ETC) that aims to provide investors with twice the daily performance of Citigroup shares. The ETC is designed for short-term trading and is not intended for long-term investment. The ETC is managed by Leverage Shares, a provider of leveraged and inverse exchange-traded products (ETPs).
